query:
SELECT e.id, e.name, e.menuSlug, 
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE establishmentId = e.id) as prods,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM categories WHERE establishmentId = e.id) as cats
FROM establishments e;
